title: Ecclinusa dumetorum
uses: Ecclinusa dumetorum has been traditionally used in folk medicine in various parts of the world for its medicinal properties. Its roots and leaves are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The plant is also believed to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its medicinal uses. Traditional healers have used extracts from Ecclinusa dumetorum to treat skin conditions and wounds. Further research is needed to fully understand the plant's medicinal potential and its effects on human health.
